title: Workload Options
excerpt: We would find it very helpful to have an option on the Workload board to show when a resource is out of office Vs. just having their circle full.  Sometimes we work to move resources around, but knowing that resource is …

posts.author: Carol_Hiscock (Carol Hiscock)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would find it very helpful to have an option on the Workload board to show when a resource is out of office Vs. just having their circle full. Sometimes we work to move resources around, but knowing that resource is not an option that week or days would be helpful.

It would also be helpful to be able to have columns of data that represented a date in its entirety and be able to pull into the board. It would make maintenance so much easier on the boards. Right now, it will only pull in one date or timeline per item.
